Scenario.Title: s

EventAction_LuaScript.ScriptText:
function spawn_SSM() local a = ScenEdit_GetReferencePoint( { side='Blue', name='RP3_BlueStart'} )
local b = a.latitude local c = a.longitude
print(b) print(c)
d = b + math.random()*5 RP4 = ScenEdit_AddReferencePoint({side='Red', name='RP4_NEW_SSM', lat=d, lon='W78.11.25', highlated=true}) SSM_NEW = ScenEdit_AddUnit({type='Facility', unitname='RED_SSM1', dbid=3787, side='Red', lat=d, lon='W78.11.25'}) PR4=ScenEdit_GetUnit({unitname='RED_SSM1'}) PR4.autodetectable = true
local StDisPat = 160 MP1 = ScenEdit_AddReferencePoint({ side = 'Red', name = 'MP1', RelativeTo_rp = 'RP4_NEW_SSM', bearing = 0, distance = StDisPat}) MP2 = ScenEdit_AddReferencePoint({ side = 'Red', name = 'MP2', RelativeTo_rp = 'RP4_NEW_SSM', bearing = 30, distance = StDisPat}) MP3 = ScenEdit_AddReferencePoint({ side = 'Red', name = 'MP3', RelativeTo_rp = 'RP4_NEW_SSM', bearing = 75, distance = StDisPat}) MP4 = ScenEdit_AddReferencePoint({ side = 'Red', name = 'MP4', RelativeTo_rp = 'RP4_NEW_SSM', bearing = 90, distance = StDisPat}) MP5 = ScenEdit_AddReferencePoint({ side = 'Red', name = 'MP5', RelativeTo_rp = 'RP4_NEW_SSM', bearing = 105, distance = StDisPat}) MP6 = ScenEdit_AddReferencePoint({ side = 'Red', name = 'MP6', RelativeTo_rp = 'RP4_NEW_SSM', bearing = 150, distance = StDisPat}) MP7 = ScenEdit_AddReferencePoint({ side = 'Red', name = 'MP7', RelativeTo_rp = 'RP4_NEW_SSM', bearing = 180, distance = StDisPat})
ScenEdit_SetTrigger({mode='add', type='UnitEntersArea', name='KILL', targetfilter={TargetType ='2', TargetSide='Blue'}, Area={'MP1', 'MP2', 'MP3', 'MP4', 'MP5', 'MP6', 'MP7'}}) ScenEdit_SetAction({mode='add', type='LuaScript', name='KILL', ScriptText="spawn_UFO()"}) ScenEdit_SetAction({mode='add', type='EndScenario', name='END'}) ScenEdit_SetEvent('KILL',{mode='add', isActive=true}) ScenEdit_SetEventTrigger('KILL', {mode='add', name='KILL'}) --ScenEdit_SetEventAction('KILL', {mode='add', name='KILL'}) ScenEdit_SetEventAction('KILL', {mode='add', name='End The Scenario'}) end
spawn_SSM()

Scenario.GameVersion: Command PE - Premium Edition v2.4.3 - Build 1777
